response.justification: The candidate has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, with notable contributions to tooling and open-source projects, but lacks explicit, recent experience with Java/Kotlin IDE tooling, Spring ecosystem, or JVM internals — core requirements for this role. Their Java exposure appears limited and outdated, with no evidence of enterprise IDE or build tool integration work.
strengths: Strong full-stack and systems-level experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven track record in developer tooling and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and technical talks
concerns: No recent or demonstrable work on JVM-based IDEs, language tooling, or IntelliJ-like subsystems
Java experience is listed but not contextualized — no Spring, Hibernate, or build tool integration shown
Primary recent tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, with minimal evidence of active Kotlin or enterprise Java development
